query: Find 10 parcels in Kristiansand municipality that intersect both 200-year storm-surge areas and 200-year flood zones, sorted by teigid ascending.

2.description: Retrieve all parcels (teig) with teigid, kommunenummer and geometry

4.description: Get 200‑year flood zones (analyseomrade where objtype ILIKE '%200%') geometry

5.description: Keep only parcels that belong to Kristiansand (join on kommunenummer)

7.description: Select parcels (from step 6) intersecting flood zones

8.description: Sort resulting parcels by teigid ascending
